THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WALTON, LARRY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1530 GOUGH ST, APT. 601, SFCA 94109 $2,460.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,460.00, STAYED UNTIL SEP-09-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, DEFT. VACATE TIMELY, PLTF WILL WAIVE BACK RENT AND DISMISS W ITH PREJUDICE WITHIN 5 DAYS.
